title: An AI just broke an 87-year-old maths problem, in a tweet sent during the World Cup final
summary: One valid counterexample is all it takes to sink a conjecture. One developer, Alexis Gallagher, says he used GPT-5.6 to turn the single counterexample into an infinite family, one for every whole number above two.
caption: output/2026-07-21/an-ai-just-broke-an-87-year-old-maths-problem-in-a-tweet-sent-during-t.txt
